nodes.label: P2.2 synth — final-probe lift vs random negative (real lift for oracle)
nodes.rationale: random-negative baseline 0.703; hard-oracle clears it clearly at 0.730 (+0.027, a real disjoint-IQR lift); hard-proto actually falls below baseline (0.694); hard-unsup 0.708. Unlike CIFAR, the oracle negative genuinely helps here.
